chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI C.P. No.D-6420 of 2021 ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with signature of Judge ----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- 1. For orders on Misc. No.27387/2021 (U/A) 2. For orders on Misc. No.27388/2021 (Ex/A). 3. For hearing of main case -------------------------------------------------------------- 03.11.2021. Mr. Qamar Iqbal, advocate for the petitioner. >><< 1. Urgency granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just exceptions. 3. Learned counsel states that the petitioner has filed a departmental appeal on 02.9.2021 against the impugned order dated 16.08.2021 before the respondent No.3, which even after passage of substantial time has not been decided. Learned counsel states that the petitioner would be satisfied and would not press this petition if directions are issued to the respondent No.3 to decide the appeal filed by the petitioner within a shortest possible time. Mr. Abdul Wahab learned DAG present in Court in some other matter has waived notice and has given no objection for disposal of this petition on the said prayer made by the counsel for the petitioner. In view of the above, the instant petition is disposed of by directing the concerned respondent to consider and decide the appeal by the petitioner in accordance with law after affording the opportunity of hearing to him within a period of one month from the date of the receipt of this order. Let a copy of this order be sent to the concerned respondent for information and compliance.

In view of the above, the instant petition is disposed of by directing the concerned respondent to consider and decide the appeal by the petitioner in accordance with law after affording the opportunity of hearing to him within a period of one month from the date of the receipt of this order. Let a copy of this order be sent to the concerned respondent for information and compliance. JUDGE JUDGE Gulzar/PA
